form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run 3rd of 9 at Chantilly All Weather on March 30 over 1400m, 2.75 len behind Limpide carrying 53.5kg at $9. The run before that ran on strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 7 at Fontainebleau on March 17 over 1200m, slow going neck behind Hollie Wood with 53kg at $6. Going well and expected to be competitive again.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 36-day let-up. At the latest run ran last of 14 at this track on March 5 over 1600m, on a slow track; 19 len behind Square D'anvers with 56.5kg at $8.30. The run before that 3rd of 8 at Cagnes-sur-Mer on February 21 over 1500m, 4.5 len behind Black Solea with 58kg at $4.60. Capable of sharp improvement.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Freshened for 36 days. First-up 6th of 15 at Chantilly All Weather on February 5 over 1600m, 6 len behind Recollect with 58kg at $4.80. Second run from a spell 11th of 14 at this track on March 5 over 1600m, slow going 8 len behind Alexander Maximus with 58kg at $4.70. Should come on at the third run back and is ready to deliver a big race.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Last run 9th of 13 at Chantilly All Weather in LR on March 8 over 1300m, 6 len behind My Calyx Cen with 55.5kg at $76. At only start last preparation 7th of 9 at Chantilly in the G3 Prix Miesque on October 27 over 1400m, on a slow track; 8 len behind Half Sovereign carrying 56kg at $32. Hard to get excited about her chances.

form.formComment: Last start came home strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 10 at Nantes on March 31 over 1400m, slow going 3.5 len behind Vanina Runaway with 58kg at $4.40. Before that second last of 7 at Le Mans on March 4 over 1600m, 13 len behind Moonlabel carrying 57kg at $17. Latest form makes this a pretty tough assignment.
